title: phalaris × daviesii
intro: Phalaris × daviesii, also known as Phalaris canariensis × Phalaris arundinacea, is a hybrid plant species in the grass family (Poaceae) that combines the characteristics of Canary grass and Reed canary grass. The medicinal properties of Phalaris × daviesii include its use in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations involving Phalaris × daviesii can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its usage and availability may vary.
